findings.title: False positive: no cryptography present (substring match on "des")
findings.description: L35/117/137 were flagged for a weak cipher; they are `descriptionId` (L35), the `descriptionId` prop spread (L117), and `aria-describedby` (L137). Pure substring match on 'des' in 'description'/'describedby'. No crypto/cipher/random/hash anywhere; this is a presentational server component. The only text interpolation is `{props.children}` (the framework's intended raw-HTML composition slot, consistent with dialog.tsx and every other UI primitive); there are no named text props rendered raw, so there is no distinct XSS sink to report beyond the framework-wide children design. Not a vulnerability.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Suppress the substring crypto rule matching 'des' inside identifiers.
